programme.desc: Forbidden Science is a unique blend of noir science fiction and erotic programming. Set in the near future, the stories revolve around the evil corporation, 4Ever Innovations, whose young and brilliant scientists download and sell memories. They replace those we've lost with clones and devise technology that helps us live out our greatest fantasies; from saving a failed relationship, to creating the perfect lover, to being irresistible to the opposite sex - but sometimes our deepest desires come at a terrible price. 4Ever offers customers the opportunity to live out their fantasies in a virtual world but there are secrets within 4Ever Innovations that may cost you your life.

programme.title: Wild Shots
programme.desc: Host Tim Harmsen teams up with SEAL Team 6 legend Don Mann to tackle real-world defense tactics and home-clearing techniques. A visit to Civil War battlefields connects history to modern freedoms, while the brutal 5-Year AR Challenge pushes an AR-15 through 10,000 rounds without cleaning. Will the rifle survive—or fail under fire?

programme.title: The Big Reveal
programme.desc: Sheriff Mark Lamb (Surviving Mann) and UFC Hall of Famer Ken Shamrock (Surviving Mann) uncover a breakthrough changing how we live in a world full of invisible forces. Join them as Aires Tech reveals the science behind a revolutionary technology built to protect the human body from electromagnetic stress—empowering performance in a wired world.

programme.title: Fortress
programme.desc: In the premiere of Fortress, Sheriff Mark Lamb and co-hosts explore America’s urgent need for security—both personal and societal. They meet a passionate team turning donated land into a homestead that feeds and shelters trafficking survivors. Then, CCW Safe steps in to showcase how legal protection for concealed carriers can be the line between justice and ruin. Powerful stories of resilience, protection, and purpose unfold in this compelling first episode.

programme.title: Surviving Mann
programme.desc: Surviving Mann returns with its most punishing season opener yet. In true Don Mann fashion, the bar is raised with a grueling 10-part physical readiness test—infused with a blast of hypothermia for good measure. Don himself calls it “the most brutal PT [he’s] ever witnessed,” and it’s clear the contestants are in for a world of hurt. To push them even further, MMA legend Ken Shamrock joins the fray, bringing his no-nonsense intensity to whip the group into fighting shape. Those who survive the trial by ice and exertion are rewarded with a chance to test-fire the lightest AR on the market—if they can still feel their trigger fingers.

programme.title: All Stars
programme.desc: Surviving Mann Season 1 thrilled with action, adventure, and good old-fashioned American determination. But, before Season 2 arrives, Don has a new challenge for the best of the best. In All-Stars the top 3 Surviving Mann contestants face off against 3 elite special ops veterans in a 50-hour no-sleep marathon battle of endurance, skill, and willpower. Do the All-Stars have what it takes to take on these spec ops legends? Find in Surviving Mann: All-Stars.

programme.title: Dead Men Don't Make Shadows 1970
programme.desc: In Dead Men Don’t Make Shadows, Hunt Powers stars as a deadly bounty hunter whose gun is as quick as his temper. Tracking ruthless outlaws across a frontier steeped in greed and bloodshed, he discovers a web of betrayal that forces him to fight not just for money, but for survival. With stylish shootouts, double-crosses, and the grit of classic Spaghetti Western flair, this tale of vengeance proves that in the West, only the fastest survive.

programme.title: Jesse and Lester 1972
programme.desc: In Jesse and Lester, Gianni Garko and Aldo Sambrell star in a Spaghetti Western with a comedic twist. When rough-and-tumble gunman Jesse teams up with mild-mannered preacher Lester, the unlikely duo sets out to claim an inheritance that could change their lives. But standing in their way are outlaws, double-crosses, and plenty of misadventures on the trail. Blending sharp humor, action, and classic Western style, this buddy adventure proves that opposites can make the wildest partners.

programme.title: Frontier Town
programme.desc: Regan is passing off counterfeit money at rodeos betting on his man Denby. When Tex appears and wins all the events, Regan has him accused of murder. As Tex looks for the counterfeiters, his pals Stubby and Pee Wee keep the Sheriff off his trail.

programme.title: Raiders of Old California
programme.desc: At the end of the Mexican-American War, a crooked U.S. Cavalry Captain and his men force a captive Mexican officer to sign the deeds to his vast lands and large hacienda over to the Captain

programme.title: Guns Of Diablo 1964
programme.desc: Charles Bronson stars as rugged scout Linc Murdock, caught in a feud with rancher Rance Macklin over the enchanting Maria. Packed with action, rivalry, and frontier grit, this Western drama also showcases a young Kurt Russell in one of his earliest roles!
